function.message: Done. I processed the next inbox message and ran OCR-style structuring on all 8 requested finance records by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body verbatim, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read/context), read system workflow docs before task work, applied finance schema for OCR frontmatter, preserved full original bodies, completed all-or-none updates, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request listed 8 specific finance files to run through OCR workflow. I read each file, extracted visible structured fields into required invoice/bill frontmatter per finance schema, preserved each original body below frontmatter, and then deleted the processed inbox file per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update guidance.
completed_steps_laconic: write updated frontmatter to 8 target finance files
